Class ViewSettings

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractSettings
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractPropertiesSettings
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.ViewSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Settings
public class ViewSettings extends AbstractPropertiesSettings
This class encapsulates information about: 1) relative font size in the prover view 2) the maximal number of lines a tooltip with instantiated SchemaVariables is allowed to have. If this number is exceeded no SchemaVariables get instantiated in the displayed tooltip. 3) whether intermediate proofsteps should be hidden in the proof tree view
(see also StandardUISettings)

  • Method Details

    • readSettings

      public void readSettings(Configuration props)
      Description copied from interface: Settings
      This method transfers the given configuration information into the local states. The setter methods are used so PropertyChangeEvent should be triggered accordingly to the new state.

      Specified by:
      readSettings in interface Settings
      Overrides:
      readSettings in class AbstractPropertiesSettings
      Parameters:
      props - a non-null references to a configuration object. The state of this object shall not be changed by the implementations.

    • readSettings

      public void readSettings(Properties props)
      Description copied from interface: Settings
      gets a Properties object and has to perform the necessary steps in order to change this object in a way that it represents the stored settings
      Specified by:
      readSettings in interface Settings
      Overrides:
      readSettings in class AbstractPropertiesSettings

    • getNotifyLoadBehaviour

      public boolean getNotifyLoadBehaviour()
      When loading a Java file, all other java files in the parent directory are loaded as well. Should there be a notification about this when opening a file?
      Returns:
      whether to show the notification.

    • setNotifyLoadBehaviour

      public void setNotifyLoadBehaviour(boolean show)
      Parameters:
      show - Whether a notification when opening a file should be shown

    • isUseUnicode

      public boolean isUseUnicode()
      Use Unicode Symbols is only allowed if pretty syntax is used
      Returns:
      setting of "use unicode symbols" (if option "use pretty syntax" is on, return the value which is set, if "use pretty syntax" is off, return false)

    • isShowHeatmap

      public boolean isShowHeatmap()
      Returns:
      whether heatmaps should be displayed

    • setHeatmapOptions

      public void setHeatmapOptions(boolean showHeatmap, boolean heatmapSF, boolean heatmapNewest, int maxAgeForHeatmap)
      Updates heatmap settings (all of the at the same time, so that fireSettingsChanged is called only once.
      Parameters:
      showHeatmap - true if heatmap on
      heatmapSF - true for sequent formulas, false for terms
      heatmapNewest - true if newest, false for "up to age"
      maxAgeForHeatmap - the maximum age for term or sequent formulas, concerning heatmap highlighting

    • isHeatmapSF

      public boolean isHeatmapSF()
      Returns:
      whether sequent formulas or terms should be highlighted

    • isHeatmapNewest

      public boolean isHeatmapNewest()
      Returns:
      whether to highlight "newest" or "up to age"

    • getMaxAgeForHeatmap

      public int getMaxAgeForHeatmap()
      Returns:
      the maximum age for term or sequent formulas, concerning heatmap highlighting

      public boolean isHighlightOrigin()

      public void setHighlightOrigin(boolean highlightOrigin)
